brand_identity.vibe: Objective, rigid, functional, high-clarity. A 'terminal' evolution that feels like a professional command center.
core_principles: The North Star Metric: Only show the most critical data at a glance.
Progressive Disclosure: Hide complexity behind tabs or settings; default to presets.
Functional Color: Klein blue for action, Red/Green for status, Monochrome for structure.
Tabular Precision: Monospace fonts for all numbers to ensure vertical alignment and quick scanning.

button.primary: bg-primary text-white font-medium px-4 py-2 rounded-sm hover:bg-primary/90 transition-colors
button.secondary: bg-surface border border-border text-primary px-4 py-2 rounded-sm hover:bg-surface_hover transition-colors
button.kill_switch: bg-white border-2 border-status-loss text-status-loss font-mono uppercase tracking-widest px-4 py-2 hover:bg-status-loss hover:text-white transition-colors

table.header: border-b-2 border-primary text-sm font-mono text-secondary uppercase pb-2

badge.style: inline-flex items-center px-2 py-1 text-xs font-mono uppercase border rounded-sm

input.style: w-full bg-white border border-border px-3 py-2 rounded-sm focus:outline-none focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary font-mono text-sm

icons.usage: Use crisp, 1.5px stroke icons. Keep icon sizes consistent (w-5 h-5 for inline, w-4 h-4 for dense tables).

persistent_header.structure: Flex container, sticky top-0, z-50. Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-border.
persistent_header.left: Brand Logo (Text), Connection Status (Green dot + mono text).
persistent_header.middle: Primary Navigation (Dashboard, Research, Configuration, History) with active states.
persistent_header.right: Kill Switch Button, Alerts Bell (with unread count badge), Paper/Live mode badge.

dashboard.structure: Control Room Grid. Dense, data-heavy, scannable.
dashboard.top_row: Account Equity (col-span-1 md:col-span-2) + Today's P&L (col-span-1) + Realized P&L (col-span-1). Use mono_large for primary numbers.
dashboard.middle_row: Portfolio Review Flags (col-span-full) - highlighted warnings for concentration/staleness.
dashboard.bottom_row: Open Positions Table (col-span-full). Minimalist table style.

research_hub.structure: Tabbed view to combine Watchlist and Influencer Ideas.
research_hub.watchlist_view: Table format: Ticker, Name, 1-5 Stars (Conviction), Active Toggle, Add/Remove actions.
research_hub.influencer_ideas_view: Bento Grid of Cards. Top section has 'Scan Now' button and YouTube channel tracking list. Below are AI-extracted idea cards: Ticker, Bull/Bear badge, Conviction, Thesis snippet.

configuration.structure: Progressive disclosure layout. Split into High-Level Presets and Plain-English Advanced Controls.
configuration.top_section: Trading Mode Toggle (Paper/Live) requiring typed confirmation ('LIVE').
configuration.presets: 3 large cards: Conservative, Balanced, Aggressive. Single click selects all parameters.
configuration.advanced_controls: Accordion or list of settings written in plain English (e.g., 'Buy the dip when stock drops by [ X ] %').
configuration.safety_limits: Max daily loss, Max exposure inputs (font-mono). Automation scheduler.

history.structure: Tabbed view: Trade History vs P&L Reports.
history.trade_history: Dense table of past trades. Mono fonts for numbers, reason for trigger.
history.pnl_reports: Rollup summary cards (Monthly/Quarterly) and benchmark comparison vs SPY.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the 'Cabinet Grotesk' for headings and 'IBM Plex Mono' for all numbers, tables, and settings inputs. This sells the 'terminal' vibe.
Do not use generic Shadcn rounded cards. Override border-radius to 'rounded-none' or 'rounded-sm' (max 2px).
Use the exact Klein Blue (#002FA7) for primary actions and active states.
Never use background colors for sections (e.g., no gray backgrounds for the whole page). Use pure white background and define areas with 1px borders (#E5E7EB).
Add data-testid attributes to all buttons, inputs, tabs, and table rows (e.g., data-testid='kill-switch', data-testid='nav-dashboard').
Avoid unnecessary icons in tables; rely on typography, alignment, and color (Red/Green) for scannability.
Implement 'Glassmorphism' (Crystal variant: bg-white/80, backdrop-blur-xl, 1px border-b) exclusively for the persistent header.
Settings should feel like filling in the blanks of a sentence (plain English controls) rather than a dense form of disjointed labels.
